paper_title: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion Models

raw_extraction.innovation: We propose latent diffusion models (LDMs) that operate in a compressed latent space derived from a perceptual autoencoder, enabling high-fidelity image synthesis with significantly reduced computational cost compared to pixel-space diffusion models
raw_extraction.application: Text-to-image synthesis, image super-resolution, image inpainting, semantic image synthesis
raw_extraction.research_problem: High-resolution image synthesis with scalable and efficient generative models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Text-to-image synthesis, image super-resolution, image inpainting
